summary: Tested Daily Closing Snapshot (Founder Liquidity View) feature - all backend API tests pass (11/11), frontend UI tests pass. Fixed a bug in the backend where the empty state response was missing required fields (date_display, is_today, account_count, total_upi_wallet).
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/daily-snapshot returns 200 for authorized roles (Founder, Admin)
GET /api/finance/daily-snapshot returns correct structure with all required fields
Default date is today when no date param provided
Date parameter works correctly for historical dates
Invalid date format returns 400
Summary totals calculation is correct (grand_total = cash + bank + upi_wallet + other)
by_type grouping has correct structure
Unauthenticated requests return 401
Founder role has access
Admin role has access
Designer role gets 403 (permission denied)
Empty accounts returns zero totals with correct structure
Daily Closing Snapshot page loads at /finance/daily-snapshot
Sidebar shows 'Daily Closing' tab under Finance menu after Trial Balance
Date selector with navigation arrows works
Previous date button navigates to yesterday
Go to Today button appears when not on today and works correctly
Refresh button reloads data
Summary cards display: Cash, Bank, UPI/Wallet, Other, Total Liquidity
Empty state displays correctly when no accounts exist
Footer shows generated timestamp and account count
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API at /api/finance/daily-snapshot (server.py lines 28405-28593) correctly implements daily closing snapshot
Fixed bug: Empty state response was missing date_display, is_today, account_count, total_upi_wallet fields
Frontend DailyClosingSnapshot.jsx properly displays all UI elements with correct data-testid attributes
Permission check correctly restricts access to Founder, Admin, FinanceManager, CharteredAccountant roles
Sidebar correctly includes Daily Closing entry at line 77 in Sidebar.jsx after Trial Balance
seed_data_creation: Created designer.test@example.com user for permission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Closing Snapshot feature fully tested. Backend endpoint: GET /api/finance/daily-snapshot with optional date query param (YYYY-MM-DD format). Frontend page at /finance/daily-snapshot with data-testid attributes: daily-snapshot-page, daily-snapshot-loading, daily-snapshot-error, refresh-snapshot, prev-date-btn, next-date-btn, date-selector, go-to-today-btn, summary-cards, accounts-by-type, account-type-{type}, custodian-split. Sidebar entry at /finance/daily-snapshot with nav-finance-daily-snapshot data-testid. Allowed roles: Founder, Admin, FinanceManager, CharteredAccountant.

backend_api.GET /api/finance/daily-snapshot: WORKING - Returns daily closing snapshot data
backend_api.Date parameter: WORKING - Accepts YYYY-MM-DD format, defaults to today
backend_api.Empty state: WORKING - Returns zero totals with correct structure when no accounts
backend_api.Summary calculation: WORKING - grand_total = total_cash + total_bank + total_upi_wallet + total_other

frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: WORKING - Daily Closing tab visible under Finance menu
frontend_ui.date_selector: WORKING - Date input with navigation arrows
frontend_ui.go_to_today: WORKING - Button appears when not on today
frontend_ui.summary_cards: WORKING - Cash, Bank, UPI/Wallet, Other, Total Liquidity displayed
frontend_ui.footer_info: WORKING - Shows generated timestamp and account count

bug_fixed.description: Empty state response was missing required fields
bug_fixed.fix: Added missing fields: date_display, is_today, account_count, total_upi_wallet to empty state response
